name: cautilus
description: Standalone CLI and Cautilus Agent for discovering, evaluating, and improving agent behavior.

interface.shortDescription: Discover, evaluate, and improve agent behavior with bounded review gates.
interface.longDescription: Install Cautilus Agent and the workflow surface for discovering behavior claims, evaluating them with adapter-driven baseline comparison and held-out validation, and improving behavior within bounded review gates.
defaultPrompt: Use Cautilus to discover the behavior claims in this repo, evaluate the ones that matter against an explicit baseline with held-out validation, and improve them within bounded review gates.
